level: full un-squared twist-curve trace field K = Q(tr a, tr b, tr ab) -- chord/framing-carrying

genuine_chord_note: un-squared trace field is a finer CHARACTER invariant (Neumann-Reid trace field), not a non-abelian/theta-odd object; built from generator-trace polynomials -- the W3-082c finer-abelian pattern. A negative here, so no chord-positive is claimed.
